content:
# Session 26 (iter-026) ‚Äî review

## Metadata
- Sorry count (SectionGradedRing.lean): **4 ‚Üí 3**. Global: 9 ‚Üí 8.
- Target attempted: B7 `sectionsMul_mul_assoc` (sole in-cone target).
- Result: **SOLVED, axiom-clean.** First-hand `#print axioms sectionsMul_mul_assoc`
  = `[propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound]` (no `sorryAx`). Cold `lake build` GREEN (2439 jobs).
- **Milestone: the ENTIRE B1‚ÄìB7 ‚àÄL associativity coherence of the graded section ring
  `‚äï‚Çò Œì(L^‚äóm)` is now complete and axiom-clean.**

## What landed
3 new/closed decls, all axiom-clean:

1. **`sectionsMul_whiskerRight_natural`** (private, ~L3270) ‚Äî RIGHT Œº-slide. iso form
   `e : F ‚âÖ F'`. `(sectionsMul F' G).hom (Œì(e.hom)(x) ‚äó y) = Œì((tensorObjWhiskerRightIso e G).hom)(sectionsMul F G (x‚äóy))`.
   Proof = exact parallel of `tensorBraiding_hom_sectionsMul`: `sectionsMul = Œ∑.app(op‚ä§)`
   (sheafification unit), Œ∑-naturality along presheaf whisker `whiskerRight (toPresheaf e.hom)(toPresheaf G)`;
   `e1`/`hw` = rfl; `congrArg`. **No comp-instance diamond appeared** (recipes a/b/c NOT needed).
2. **`sectionsMul_whiskerLeft_natural`** (private, ~L3328) ‚Äî LEFT Œº-slide, mirror via
   `whiskerLeft (toPresheaf F)(toPresheaf e.hom)`. iso form `e : G ‚âÖ G'`.
3. **`sectionsMul_mul_assoc`** (B7, ~L3381) ‚Äî closed by the planned 4-step `rw`-assembly
   (mirrors `sectionsMul_mul_one`):
   - `simp only [gMul_mul_apply]` (unfold both products to `Œì(Œº)‚àòsectionsMul`)
   - `rw [sectionsMul_whiskerRight_natural (tensorPowAdd L na nb) (tensorPow L nc) ‚Ä¶ c]` (2a)
   - `rw [sectionsMul_whiskerLeft_natural (tensorPow L na) (tensorPowAdd L nb nc) a ‚Ä¶]` (2b)
   - `rw [‚Üê tensorObjAssoc_hom_sectionsMul (L^na)(L^nb)(L^nc) a b c]` (B5 backwards)
   - `exact congrArg (fun i => (i.hom.val.app (op‚ä§)).hom z) (tensorPowAdd_assoc L na nb nc)` (B6 pentagon at base elt `z`).
   **Key insight:** both sides reduce to `Œì(¬∑)(z)` for the two pentagon composites; functor-comp /
   `Iso.trans_hom` / `sectionsCast_apply` are all `rfl`, so the `congrArg` of B6 closes directly at
   the section/element level ‚Äî no `monoidal`/`simp` gymnastics, no diamond. The closing technique
   diverges in difficulty from B6's: B6 needed the generic-`M` core to dodge the diamond; B7 stays
   at the element level where the diamond never surfaces.

## Out-of-scope (deferred, untouched ‚Äî correct)
3 remaining sorries (~L3435/3450/3492): `tensorBraiding_self_eq_id_of_isInvertible`,
`tensorPowAdd_comm`, `sectionsMul_mul_comm`. All `[IsInvertible L]`-gated FUTURE comm chain, **no
consumer** (`GCommSemiring` unbuilt); `sectionsMul_mul_comm` is mathematically **FALSE** for general
`L` (section ring = free tensor algebra). Do NOT re-assign.

## Verification (both highly-recommended dispatched ‚Äî prover touched the file)
- **lean-vs-blueprint-checker** `iter026` ‚Äî **PASS, 0 must-fix, 1 minor.** B7 axiom-clean + faithful
  to `lem:sectionMul_coherent` assoc clause; both slides faithful; the iso-vs-general-morphism
  difference is an **acceptable specialization, not a defect** (Lean iso = blueprint statement at
  `f = e.hom`; only consumer feeds the iso `tensorPowAdd`). No false `\leanok`: `lem:sectionMul_coherent`
  correctly unmarked (bundles still-sorried `sectionsMul_mul_comm`); 3 deferred sorries carry only
  statement-block `\leanok`. Minor = the `% NOTE:` on iso restriction (APPLIED, see below).
  Report: `task_results/lean-vs-blueprint-checker-iter026.md`.
- **lean-auditor** `iter026` ‚Äî **CLEAN, 0 critical / 0 major / 2 minor.** Both slides genuine (same
  Œ∑-naturality pattern, all `rfl`s hold definitionally, LSP 0 errors); B7 genuine (reduces to B6 via
  the 2 slides + B5); all 3 sorries honest + un-weakened (retain `[IsInvertible L]`); no
  `maxHeartbeats 1e6`, no `axiom`, no protected-sig edits, no excuse-comments. 2 minor = (1) stale
  comment "REMAINING BLOCKER" @L3181 inside the now-closed `tensorPowAdd_assoc` succ branch; (2) the
  iso-NOTE (handled). Report: `task_results/lean-auditor-iter026.md`.

## Blueprint markers updated (manual)
- `Picard_SectionGradedRing.tex`, `lem:sectionsMul_whiskerRight_natural`: added `% NOTE:` recording
  the Lean iso specialization `e : F ‚âÖ F'` vs the general-morphism statement (lvbc-iter026 minor).
- `Picard_SectionGradedRing.tex`, `lem:sectionsMul_whiskerLeft_natural`: same `% NOTE:` (iso `e : G ‚âÖ G'`).
- No `\leanok` overrides needed ‚Äî `sync_leanok` iter-026 added 4 (the 2 slide statement+proof blocks),
  removed 0; **CLEAN, the 11-iter over-strip streak stays broken** (2nd clean iter). `lem:sectionMul_coherent`
  correctly left bare (bundles sorried comm). No `\mathlibok` / `\lean{}` rename / `\notready` changes.

## Blueprint doctor (iter-026)
Only pre-existing out-of-cone merge-back artifacts (unchanged iters 011‚Üí026): `Cohomology_FlatBaseChange.tex`
covers 2 nonexistent files + 14 broken `\ref`; `Picard_GlueDescent.tex` 4 broken `\cref`/`\uses`;
`Picard_QuotScheme.tex` 13 broken `\cref`. All outside the 3-seed cone ‚Üí resolve at merge-back, not here.

## Notes (low)
- lean-auditor minor: stale "REMAINING BLOCKER" comment @L3181 (closed succ branch) ‚Äî routed to
  recommendations (review cannot edit `.lean`).
- 343 `lean_aux` unmatched dag nodes = inherited Grassmannian.*/GradedModule.* + private helpers
  (merge-back, exempt). The 2 new slides ARE blueprint-pinned (`lem:sectionsMul_whisker{Right,Left}_natural`).
